---
title: "Testing"
---

:::{.column-page-inset-right}

{{< revealjs file="/slides/06-testing.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

:::

# Slide Contents

{{< include /slides/06-testing.qmd >}}

# Code

:::{.column-page-inset}

`code/demos/testing/app.py`

```{.python}
{{< include /../code/demos/testing/app.py >}}
```

`code/demos/testing/test_app.py`

```{.python}
{{< include /../code/demos/testing/test_app.py >}}
```

:::
